members.name: forceMount

members.name: descriptionProps
members.description: Properties forwarded to the description element.

referencedTypes.name: AccordionDescriptionProps
referencedTypes.description: Properties for the AccordionDescription component.

members.name: collapsible
members.description:
When type is "single", allows closing content when clicking trigger for an open item.

When type is "multiple", this prop has no effect.

members.name: dir
members.description: The reading direction of the accordion when applicable. If omitted, assumes LTR (left-to-right) reading mode.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, prevents the user from interacting with the accordion and all its items

members.name: orientation
members.description: The orientation of the accordion.

members.name: unmountOnHide
members.description: When `true`, the element will be unmounted on closed state.

members.name: modelValue
members.description:
The controlled value of the selected item(s).

Use this when you need to control the state of the items. Can be bound with `v-model`

members.name: defaultValue
members.description:
The default value of the selected item(s).

Use this when you need to set the initial state of the items.

members.name: multiple
members.description:
Determines whether a "single" or "multiple" items can be selected at a time.

This prop will overwrite the inferred type from `modelValue` and `defaultValue`.

members.name: clearable
members.description: Whether selected item can be cleared when `multiple` is false.

members.name: selectionBehavior
members.description: How multiple selection should behave in the collection.

callables.name: update:modelValue
callables.parameters: value: M extends true ? string[] : string
